html:
Exclusive to:

The Howling Conch is a craftable Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Volcanic Tab and requires 4 Obsidian, 1 Purple Gem and 1 Magic Seal to craft. Like all items in the Volcanic Tab, it cannot be prototyped and the player must be near an Obsidian Workbench or wearing a Brain of Thought to craft it.

Using the Howling Conch will start Strong Winds lasting for about half a Day. When taken to a base game world or Reign of Giants world with the Seaworthy or Skyworthy, the conch will create Rain instead of Strong Winds lasting for about half a Day. This allows for a Reign of Giants world in Summer to not trigger smoldering as long as the Rain stays.

Contents

  • 1 Tips
  • 2 Bugs
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Tips

  • The Sail Stick can be equipped after blowing the Howling Conch for half a day of boosted sailing speed, but a Walking Cane still provides a greater speed boost when sailing with the wind.
  • Using the Howling Conch while its effects are still active may initiate a hurricane outside of Hurricane Season with the associated rain and lightning. This is useful for WX-78 players in need of Overchage or Walani players who want more waves to ride during Dry Season.
  • Rain will allow Mushrooms to grow.
  • In rain, Farm crops grow up to 300% faster.
  • Rain will cause Flowers to spawn.

Bugs

  • The light of day will become dimmer when using the Howling Conch in a Don't Starve or Reign of Giants due to the Rain.
  • Sometimes when trying to create Rain, the Howling Conch will not work until the light of day (not exactly when it becomes the afternoon) becomes dimmer.

Trivia

  • The crafting menu description and Woodie's quote reference the song "The Wreck of the Edmund Fitzgerald" by Canadian musician Gordon Lightfoot.

Gallery

  • Warly next to a Howling Conch.
  • Walani playing the Howling Conch.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Howling Conch
"The gales come early."

"wind_conch"
“I can hear the wind trapped within.”
–Wilson
“Hope no fires get blown out.”
–Willow
“Shell makes scary sounds!”
–Wolfgang
“A terrifying force of nature contained within a delicate shell.”
–Wendy
“THIS BLOWS”
–WX-78
“With a song that moves atmospheric pressures.”
–Wickerbottom
“I can hear the chime of twenty-nine bells.”
–Woodie
“Beautiful on the outside, destructive on the inside.”
–Maxwell
“Intriguing! Its sound reverberations have an effect on the weather”
–Wagstaff
“I feel a breeze...”
–Wigfrid
“A nice ocean breeze waits inside this shell. Well, maybe not so nice.”
–Webber
“Get those waves cranking!”
–Walani
“Oh, how I'm homesick for conch snacks.”
–Warly
“Brings th'storm down.”
–Woodlegs
“BLOW, WINDS, WILBA CRACK HER CHEEKS”
–Wilba
“Blow rock”
–Wormwood
“I could've used this on my balloon.”
–Wheeler

This allows for a Reign of Giants world in Summer to not trigger smoldering as long as the Rain stays.

The Sail Stick can be equipped after blowing the Howling Conch for half a day of boosted sailing speed, but a Walking Cane still provides a greater speed boost when sailing with the wind.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ốc Xà Cừ là một Vật Phẩm chế tạo được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Núi Lửa và cần 4 Đá Vỏ Chai, 1 Đá Quý Tím và 1 Phong Ấn Ma Thuật để chế tạo. Giống như tất cả các vật phẩm trong Thẻ Núi lửa, nó không thể được tạo nguyên mẫu và người chơi phải ở gần Bàn làm việc Obsidian hoặc đeo Brain of Thought để chế tạo nó.

It is found in the [[Volcanic Tab]] and requires 4 [[Obsidian]], 1 [[Purple Gem]] and 1 [[Magic Seal]] to craft. Like all items in the [[Volcanic Tab]], it cannot be prototyped and the player must be near an [[Obsidian Workbench]] or wearing a [[Brain of Thought]] to craft it. Using the Howling Conch will start [[Strong Winds]] lasting for about half a [[Day]]. When taken to a base game world or ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' world with the [[Seaworthy]] or [[Skyworthy]], the conch will create [[Rain]] instead of Strong Winds lasting for about half a Day. This allows for a ''Reign of Giants'' world in [[Seasons/Summer|Summer]] to not trigger smoldering as long as the Rain stays. == {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * The [[Sail Stick]] can be equipped after blowing the Howling Conch for half a day of boosted sailing speed, but a [[Walking Cane]] still provides a greater speed boost when sailing with the wind. * Using the Howling Conch while its effects are still active may initiate a hurricane outside of [[Seasons/Hurricane|Hurricane Season]] with the associated rain and lightning. This is useful for [[WX-78]] players in need of Overchage or [[Walani]] players who want more waves to ride during [[Seasons/Dry|Dry Season]]. * Rain will allow [[Mushroom]]s to grow. * In rain, [[Farm]] crops grow up to 300% faster. * Rain will cause [[Flower]]s to spawn. == {{pic|32|Mosquito}} Bugs == * The light of day will become dimmer when using the Howling Conch in a ''Don't Starve'' or ''Reign of Giants'' due to the Rain. * Sometimes when trying to create Rain, the Howling Conch will not work until the light of day (not exactly when it becomes the afternoon) becomes dimmer. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The crafting menu description and Woodie's quote reference the song "[[wikipedia:The Wreck of the Edmund Fitzgerald|The Wreck of the Edmund Fitzgerald]]" by Canadian musician [[wikipedia:Gordon Lightfoot|Gordon Lightfoot]]. == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Schermafbeelding 2016-02-08 om 16.53.01.png|[[Warly]] next to a Howling Conch. walani_conch.png|[[Walani]] playing the Howling Conch.
